blended.narrative: Welch Village is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 1.0" of snow, highs of 25°F, winds around 21 mph.
